_scenarios_file: Path to scenario definitions, relative to this file's directory.

run._scenario: Scenario name from scenarios.json or inline scenarios block. Default: figure5
run._output_directory: CSV/JSON output folder. Empty string uses output/<scenario>.
run._enable_visualization: Master switch for SFML visualization. Default: true. CLI: --no-viz
run._live_visualization: Step-by-step live window during simulation. Default: true. CLI: --no-live-viz
run._viz_step_delay_ms: Milliseconds between live visualization frames. Default: 150. CLI: --viz-delay-ms
run._preview_only: Show scenario layout only; skip simulation. CLI: --preview
run._preview_all: Preview every scenario in sequence. CLI: --preview-all
run._list_scenarios: Print scenario list and exit. CLI: --list-scenarios
run._benchmark_all: Run all performance scenarios and write benchmark.csv. CLI: --benchmark-all
run._python_compat: Use Multiagent CCRRT.py planner settings. CLI: --python-compat

planner._motion_step: Distance traveled per simulation timestep. Smaller = smoother paths (default: 0.2). Set 0 to use expand_distance.
planner._enable_path_smoothing: Shortcut-smoothing of RRT paths before execution. Default: false. CLI: --path-smoothing to enable for one run
planner._collision_bound_M: Max collision probability per step (chance constraint M). Default: 0.2
planner._confidence_alpha: Alpha-confidence level for uncertainty tubes. Default: 0.99
planner._mc_samples: Monte Carlo samples per collision check. Default: 1000. CLI: --mc-samples
planner._max_iterations: Max RRT iterations per plan. Default: 5000
planner._max_timesteps: Max simulation timesteps. Default: 1000 (raised for finer motion_step)
planner._process_noise: Additive variance per tree step and prediction advance. Paper/default: 0.2
planner._max_prediction_variance: Implementation guardrail: cap prediction tube variance so finite-budget replans remain feasible. Paper covariance still grows linearly before this check.
planner._measurement_noise: Kalman measurement noise; also per-step uncertainty after GPS collapse for robots and dynamic obstacles. Default: 0.2
planner._bounds_min: RRT sampling lower bound (overridden by scenario bounds at runtime). Default: -4.0
planner._bounds_max: RRT sampling upper bound (overridden by scenario bounds at runtime). Default: 20.0
planner._rng_seed: RNG seed for reproducibility. Default: 42. CLI: --seed
planner._use_legacy_collision: Use Python-style deterministic collision checks instead of Monte Carlo. Default: false
planner._legacy_p_safe: Legacy safety factor when use_legacy_collision is true. Default: 0.8
planner._variance_growth_alpha: Multiplicative variance growth factor in legacy mode. Default: 0.1
